description_long: This is a two-tiered, round cake with a vibrant aquatic mermaid theme. The lower tier is decorated in a turquoise blue with a border of seashells and underwater plants, while the upper tier is a deep purple adorned with white speckles resembling bubbles or stars. The top of the cake features a cutout of a cartoon mermaid with red hair, a shell crown, and a shell motif, along with the text 'Anne Sereia' in white script. The cake is set on a white round cake stand, and the overall decoration is playful and festive, suitable for a children's birthday party. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with detailed printed or piped decorations.
description: A two-tiered, mermaid-themed cake with vibrant blue and purple colors, seashell decorations, and a cartoon mermaid topper. The cake is festive and visually striking, perfect for celebrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mermaid topper, shell decorations, and the 'Anne Sereia' text clearly on the upper tier.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the back of the cake with visible support sticks for the topper and no text or main decorations.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the shell border and the mermaid topper, with the underwater plant decorations visible on the lower tier.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the shell border and support sticks, with no text or main character visible.
